title: Tencent Workbuddy: RIP Claude,Codex! This is ACTUALLY quite a bit CRAZY!
summary: Tencent WorkBuddy is a desktop AI productivity agent that handles file analysis, spreadsheet work, report generation, and presentations. It includes 100+ domain-specific expert agents, team collaboration, remote task control via Slack/Telegram/Discord, and integrations with GitHub, Jira, Google Drive, and Notion.
writeup: The video covers Tencent WorkBuddy, a desktop AI agent built for productivity work: reading files, analyzing spreadsheets, generating reports, and creating presentations. It catalogs the platform's distinguishing features, including 100+ domain-specific expert agents, team collaboration, remote task control through messaging apps, and integrations with tools such as GitHub and Slack. A skill marketplace extends the agent's capabilities beyond the built-in set. The framing positions it against coding-focused assistants by emphasizing multi-agent breadth and tool connectivity rather than a single workflow.
